prompt: Use case: illustration-story. Create a polished 16:9 whiteboard illustration matching the reference Tiny Agent character exactly: a friendly smiling robot, large on the left half, waving with one hand and giving a cheerful confident gesture with the other. Preserve the rounded paper-gray body, black face screen, two blue oval eyes, small blue smile, antenna with blue dot, round ear covers, brown tool belt, and sparse red/blue tools. Use a flat neutral paper-gray #ECECEA whiteboard background with an extremely faint grid and generous clean negative space on the right for typography. Thick rounded black marker lines, sparse #117ABD blue emphasis, no text, letters, numbers, logo, watermark, source cards, quotation marks, calendar, programmer, UI, extra characters, pure white background, or pure white surfaces.
